ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "new_study_id" INTEGER /* New study ID for tracking purposes */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., toxicology, pharmacology) */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the study started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the study ended */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the study */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., crystalline, amorphous) */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for the material */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the material */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the material */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity of the material */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the material record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the material record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the material record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the material record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_materials" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the material used in the study */,
  "exposure_duration" TEXT /* Duration of material exposure in the study */,
  "exposure_route" TEXT /* Route of exposure (e.g., oral, inhalation) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the study-material relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study-material relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the study-material relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study-material relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "post_exposure_days" INTEGER /* Number of days after exposure */,
  "total_dose" REAL /* Total dose of the material */,
  "total_cell_count" REAL /* Total cell count (fold of control) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted (e.g., in vitro, in vivo) */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the test */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_versions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_versions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to make the change (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
